title: EJAE Makes Golden Globe History With Best Original Song Win
text: EJAE became the first Korean-American to win Best Original Song at the Golden Globes when her song Golden from KPop Demon Hunters took home the award. EJAE served as co-songwriter and the singing voice for the character Rumi in the film. She accepted the award alongside her co-songwriter Mark Sonnenblick and producers 24 and IDO. Golden won Best Original Song - Motion Picture at the 2026 Golden Globes. In addition to this achievement, KPop Demon Hunters also won the Best Motion Picture - Animated award at the same ceremony. The song topped the charts and became one of the most successful K-pop crossover hits.
